title: Strategic Sourcing & Category Intelligence
guardrails: Packets are advisory: sourcing events, RFQ awards, tariff publications, supplier approvals, contract changes, and spend commits remain human-approved in source workflows.
Queue review and approve actions write audit events and may enqueue AssistantActionQueueItem rows — they never launch sourcing automation or mutate procurement records silently.

steps: Sign in with suppliers, RFQ, tariffs, orders, or reports edit access.
Open /assistant/strategic-sourcing-category-intelligence and click Create Sprint 19 packet.
Confirm AssistantStrategicSourcingPacket persists with sourcingScore and dimensional JSON.
scenarios.passWhen: POST create_packet returns 201 and GET lists the packet without RFQ or tariff mutations.

steps: Queue strategic sourcing review with optional note.
scenarios.passWhen: Status REVIEW_QUEUED and audit answerKind sprint19_ss_rev recorded.

steps: Approve packet after category council sign-off.
Verify sprint19_ss_ok audit narrative denies automatic awards or spend commits.
scenarios.passWhen: Status APPROVED; RFQs, tariff versions, suppliers unchanged.
